textByHash.000efab3e890f037645c2debec39fbd68f098682: I know not how I can adequately reward you for your efforts... although I do have these mystical gauntlets, a family heirloom that through some power unknown to me, have always returned to the head of the family
textByHash.0225078f5d4ed551ae43c8062516dad00a85bb0b: Have you any news on my crest yet?
textByHash.071b46067b6bfdfd2055b0e20044b62335a648e8: time. When you captured a rival family's clan, you also captured their lands and wealth.
textByHash.0f86fdb70afaafb9297c2221be80d9890ed18fad: Combine that with the whole Shield of Arrav business and things are really starting to look up for us!
textByHash.133caeec741de8ad0fd1b95505f3390b93e13c4f: Yes, your goldsmithing gauntlets returned to me through their magic power recently. Would you like them back?
textByHash.162fc4d97f986481bfdc56b234a2bd4d18b11070: Okay, I suppose there will be no time better than this to tell you the truth.
textByHash.18f7c50ffa2130d941d2e8c880ae0553376ad16c: I need 500,000 coins. Can you help me out with that?
textByHash.19deea42c49998422506dd97bed46929e8339d91: however, it also represents the lawful rights of each family to prove their ownership of their wealth and lands. If the family crest is lost, then the family's estate is handed over to the current monarch until the crest is
textByHash.2472ddc4e55f2fb574b6d7b941536ca13ae411c9: You may, but you'll have to ask my sons for them, unless you just want a pair of the Steel gauntlets.
textByHash.25e00425af6435c15b2e285d934b7ba881ab3898: Well, I suppose I could help, but I am getting on a bit now. I'm not quite the warrior I used to be.
textByHash.25f533d6b58b64ec510991eba474ae256f6af726: I will not forget what you did for my family . Those 500,000 coins have allowed us to put food on the table.
textByHash.28bc9324492d516bd7d831f203b9e564023836dc: I realise it was a lot to ask of a stranger.
textByHash.2a85ba909618cee5b77db9fc83dd8b4254442f58: No no, your work was indeed very helpful, the crest is important to us, it helps to portray that we are indeed wealthy, despite the fact we are not.
textByHash.2f7f1cfd0e26c849c83d8b731a4be4a80efb54b1: Yes, your steel gauntlets returned to me through their magic power recently. Would you like them back?
textByHash.335fe69c3c6b346938449988c6efc11032d7ce6b: I'm sorry for lying to you , it was just all part of the ploy to make our family seem wealthy.
textByHash.3360204df0683b4d7ad54bec071ec223404eccc3: Well, there is a long standing rule of chivalry amongst the Varrockian aristocracy, where each noble family is in possession of a unique crest, which signifies the honour and lineage of the family. More than this
textByHash.4538be0c13ae04e75ab9822f6f4c802a01650ee9: What was that? I didn't quite catch that.
textByHash.47f72739a1116dd0f43d814c9548ff0c6e64de50: I will not forget what you did for my family. Those 500,000 coins have allowed us to put food on the table.
textByHash.4827694166177fdccbac4b7645d9b8fa666de03c: Have you spoke to Avan, Caleb and Johnathon yet?
textByHash.4ab78bb9c0e3c683d33e00ac7c89478e1f309a88: You may, but you'll have to ask my sons for them, unless you just want the plain steel gauntlets.
textByHash.593a1177b6004a20d0ef974c0c60584701df22cd: You are truly a hero in every sense, and perhaps your efforts can begin to patch the wounds that have torn this family apart...
textByHash.61d6ffa6891236c3411275971e069b44a9a6aa43: For many years I had assumed them all dead, as I had heard no word from them, but recently I heard word that my son Caleb is alive and well, and trying to earn his fortune as a great chef in the lands beyond White
textByHash.62551e913b8001d4c1e80c4f11d0290ec1b759a6: whenever lost, or if the owner has died. I will pledge these to you, and if you should lose them return to me, and they will be here.
textByHash.6330578ddd1b8d3bb6544b926b80f0743d3b65fe: They're not heirlooms at all, we have crates full of the things hidden away in the basement.
textByHash.66f859e45e8ffac303746c9593dc0e20ae775d96: Gah! Lousy Beggar! Your sort is what's ruining this great land! Why don't you just go and get a job if you need the money so badly?
textByHash.69e0f495029008013a2db9cd4da1705c8c614633: I will be here if you change your mind.
textByHash.6c190e8deab579f7976f770553b24ff64965ce75: Gah! Lousy beggar! Your sort is what's ruining this great land! Why don't you just go and get a job if you need money so badly?
textByHash.6f21649b9f5df5b4434d48afbc7f738d805f9b5c: Well, my three sons took it with them many years ago when they rode out to fight in the war against the undead necromancer and his army in the battle to save Varrock.
textByHash.7f8718dc0b2590e929d9d865a1db4b82e70d89dd: This dates back to the times when there was much in- fighting amongst the noble families and their clans, and was introduced as a way of reducing the bloodshed that was devestating the ranks of the ruling classes at that
textByHash.80fa1e11b214382586239a50bdfe4f6ba3a6f2eb: That is excellent news . It's good to hear they are doing well.
textByHash.8b162e630f0950920aa6cc5fdbbd577ca785bc46: Wolf Mountain, although I know not where.
textByHash.8c04a4b9944248e2f7eca60427ec8ecbac92da71: You want me to use the shield? It seems to be responding to me in some way! Is this what you were expecting?
textByHash.8ce17e5da2f538ea3fcdcf04e93e42a118d014de: Well, come back if you change your mind any time. I owe you for your trouble.
textByHash.8d9bf9d714550e09c6af5f3d5103310b27016490: I mean, if you were wealthy, would you live in a tiny house in the darkest corner of Varrock? Not a chance. This is your chance to do us a final favour, may I have 500,000 coins from you?
textByHash.8ffcf21034a6f8762d164c1647bee8b394178db0: That doesn't sound entirely convincing, but I'll give it a go.
textByHash.919051213423a81e4880318c51f3f9eaef7a735c: Yes, your chaos gauntlets returned to me through their magic power recently. Would you like them back?
textByHash.92101b92d96be47697436ec7d5261195c6893737: Hello again, adventurer. I hope that Shield of Arrav business marks the start of something big for my family. Maybe it will help me finally get out of this hole!
textByHash.961e6d6cc49a3a268ccf93bec4013f5cacbaa320: Slow down. I haven't told you what it is yet!
textByHash.96bb0c5f21333f1441c4e180f08d03752dac77d2: My family consider what you did for us a great service. We couldn't possibly trouble you further.
textByHash.9b3e041d9d8f58c71dc9e0110d8854a6ef7d226c: Ah, yes, I know of the shield's legend. I don't understand what that has to do with me though.
textByHash.9df8ee86353cb83789fe26d86d6c3093896d7145: I'm sorry for lying to you, , it was just all part of the ploy to make our family seem wealthy.
textByHash.a3b908727ec20a828d44b2a4a305f74ec05309bd: An adventurer hmmm? How lucky. I may have an adventure for you. I desperately need my family crest returning to me. It is of utmost importance.
textByHash.a476de8cc22caaf0fe3cbfd130b277f6cad4125c: The King has taken my estate from me until such time as I can show my family crest to him.
textByHash.b3589e2a67abf7d3b6a84eb9252662dbe9f0460e: Adventurer... I can only thank you for your kindness, although the words are insufficient to express the gratitude I feel!
textByHash.bfa77ccac3a1b0c6b7194b6309a0e9ced898409e: The only thing I have heard of my son Caleb is that he is trying to earn his fortune as a great chef in the lands beyond White Wolf Mountain.
textByHash.c249c6404c47537649c47c1f9cb4552c3040bd29: Yes, your cooking gauntlets returned to me through their magic power recently. Would you like them back?
textByHash.c33ff183318dfcc7a3a8f4393c9596301391fda7: You have my eternal gratitude for all you have done in saving my family's honour, adventurer. Perhaps some day my sons will overcome their differences.
textByHash.c6337c002bdd9ddee2d8e088936d8a8a8e6333f4: There really isn't anything, I am very content with life right now.
textByHash.c825983b1c3d94fd001275dcd1e2bc83dd3dbce6: Okay okay. Fine then. Whilst I don't have anything for you, how about you try my sons, they are always wanting something done.
textByHash.ca9024284e5cb3fe7d0f90d8a052061e6e480a9f: Hello. My name is Dimintheis, of the noble family Fitzharmon.
textByHash.d90b6c1460805d2f09709aad23598d310bfb15da: No, I don't think so. You must have them yourself somewhere.
textByHash.dd88fa025acff5572b2204b0cca22b691c83d5f0: Our family just pretends to be rich . We gave ourselves a fancy surname, pretended the gauntlets are a family heirloom and asked adventurers to solve our family issues.
textByHash.ecc2c4b04bdbc4a9c6efe9bf56017a15c9816897: Come to think of it, there is something you can help me out with!
textByHash.ed14099845814ce2924c1c10c69df9ef95af6ae1: I thank you greatly adventurer! Also... if you find Caleb... please... let him know his father still loves him...
textByHash.ed2b5cd8fef69265b6420a496515b16774d9dbf1: Thank you very much. In appreciation, I will inform Avan, Caleb and Johnathon that you did yet another great deed for the family, and that you would find more pairs of those gauntlets useful.
textByHash.f4321a1359dc7c0600c58a6d6f16cbdbc48a6e32: They can also be granted extra powers. Take them to one of my sons, they should be able to imbue them with a skill for you.
textByHash.fd9672618f31d54a6ec0a91cdf64a330d63c7a80: It's all I have to give...
